description: Project Overview: This construction project involves building a new 22-unit Apartment Building that will provide Affordable housing as per city guidelines. The scope of the work includes ground-up construction. The estimated project duration is 12 Months. Compliance with Local Codes: This construction project will comply with the following city codes and regulations: - Zoning Requirements: The property is located in Mid-City, and the project meets the zoning requirements for 22 Unit Apartment Building Building Codes: The construction will adhere to the City of New Orleans Building Code to ensure safety, structural integrity, and accessibility. - Environmental Regulations: The project will follow environmental guidelines for waste management, water runoff, air quality, and noise control. - Energy Efficiency: The construction will incorporate energy-efficient materials and methods per the city's energy codes.

description: Repair parapet cap and repaint entire building, mural on one exterior wall.

New construction of at 3-story, 104,715sf apartment building. BW Cooper Senior is an affordable housing apartment building for seniors (all independent living). There are 103 one-bedroom apartments plus amenities including a community room, equipped laundry rooms, mail room, private fenced courtyard with walking paths and seating, bike parking, and EV charging stations. There is an existing building on site that was the original affordable housing and we are preserving, renovating, and making it the new leasing office. All work to be done as per plans. description: EMERGENCY/SAFETY ISSUE FOR FELLOWSHIP HALL: Full exterior shell repairs to make the building structurally sound & weather proof. Current structure is falling apart. Our Scope is to renovate this building to make it safe - Replacing/repairing Foundation Piers & Sill Beams, Removing & Replacing front concrete steps with brick steps and iron handrail, Refurbishing front porch deck boards, Replace front porch handrail in kind, Front crawl space under porch to be bricked, Refurbishing all windows (If some window need replacement we will use new wood windows the same size & profile), Relocating back door & installing a handicap ramp & back deck, Refurbishing yard fence, Refurbishing front facade in kind - minor rot repairs, Replacing all left, back & right elevation siding - 4" Hardie lap siding, Full exterior paint (Siding to be BMOC 45 Swiss Coffee, windows & doors to be SW Tricorn Black), Re framing interior - see attached plans, New gutters, & New roof

RENOVATION OF AN EXISTING BUILDING TO RESTAURANT/BAR/EVENT SPACE.- NEW COMMERCIAL KITCHEN AND DINING AREA ON THE FIRST FLOOR. NEW SCREENED IN PORCH. NO WORK ON SECOND FLOOR AT THIS TIME. ALL WORK TO BE DONE AS PER PLANS.
